action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval is 0.596 SR (iter 9). Current checkpoints/ dir is intact with all 10 envs. predict.py is clean (no special config). Time: 3.1h, 19 iters left. Analysis: The 3 hard envs are unlikely to improve. Best move: try one more focused experiment on Dynamic-Obstacles (which got best=0.010 and is the most tractable) using a different approach (action restriction to 3 actions might still help, or just longer training with different seed). But risk of overwriting good checkpoint. Safer: try training Dynamic-Obstacles with restricted actions to a SEPARATE dir, then test via predict.py with override. Actually — simplest path to a higher score: try retraining FourRooms (currently 0.66 SR) and KeyCorridor (0.68) and UnlockPickup (0.72) to push them higher. These already work; pushing them from 0.7→0.9 is more reliable than 0→0.5 on hard envs. Decision: Re-eval first to confirm current state, then decide. Actually I already evaled iter9=0.596. Just push the partially-solved envs longer. Let me retrain FourRooms, KeyCorridor with more steps to a new dir, and merge if better.
